name: financial-insider
description: A self-hosted personal finance tracker. Tracks net worth, assets, monthly bills, and budget expenses across devices via Tailscale.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter backend dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.restart: lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u) ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.financial-insider.plist 2>/dev/null; launchctl bootstrap gui/$(id -u) ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.financial-insider.plist
